title: Flavorful Fluffy Ethiopian Lentils Azifa
description: A hearty and flavorful Ethiopian dish featuring red lentils, dry sherry, and a blend of spices, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and is egg-free friendly. This azifa recipe is a funky and fluffy twist on traditional Ethiopian cuisine.
instructions: In a large pot, bring 4 cups of water to a boil.
Add the red lentils, salt, and black pepper to the pot, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 20 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Stir in the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute.
Add the dry sherry to the skillet and cook until the liquid has almost completely evaporated, about 2 minutes.
Stir the skillet mixture into the lentil pot and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve the azifa hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
